svg.title: Sliding window trace over array [2, 3, 1, 2, 4, 3] searching for a subarray summing to target 6
svg.desc: Eleven snapshots of a variable-size sliding window scanning for contiguous subarrays that sum to 6. Pointers L and R bound the current window shown in red, and curr tracks the running sum, which the window expands or shrinks to try to match the target.
